highlights.text: Kuala Lumpur (2N) → Langkawi (3N) city & island circuit
Petronas Towers, Batu Caves & Merdeka Square
Langkawi SkyBridge via SkyCab cable car

itinerary.title: Kuala Lumpur Langkawi Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Kuala Lumpur • Petronas Towers • Langkawi • SkyBridge • Mangroves
itinerary.overview: The perfect synergy of vibrant city life and tranquil island beauty. From Kuala Lumpur's iconic towers and Batu Caves to Langkawi's pristine beaches, SkyBridge, and mangrove cruises — a 6-day TRAGUIN family expedition designed for unforgettable memories.
itinerary.seo_title: MY-003 | Kuala Lumpur Langkawi Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Malaysia family package (MY-003): Kuala Lumpur, Langkawi SkyBridge, Batu Caves, and mangrove boat expedition.

days.title: Arrival in Kuala Lumpur
days.description: TRAGUIN private chauffeur meets you at the airport. Seamless transfer to premium hotel. Evening breathtaking city views from Petronas Towers observation deck.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Petronas Twin Towers observation deck
Overnight Stay: Kuala Lumpur (Premium City Hotel)
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: Kuala Lumpur Exploration
days.description: Visit spiritual Batu Caves with immense scenic beauty. City tour featuring Merdeka Square and local craft markets.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Batu Caves, Merdeka Square, local craft markets
Overnight Stay: Kuala Lumpur (Premium City Hotel)

days.title: Fly to Langkawi
days.description: Transfer to airport for flight to Langkawi, the jewel of Kedah. Check into premium beach stay and enjoy relaxing sunset walk on the beach.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Domestic flight coordination to Langkawi, beach sunset walk

days.title: Langkawi Island Discovery
days.description: Iconic Langkawi SkyBridge accessible via SkyCab cable car. Explore unique geological wonders and breathtaking island landscapes.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Langkawi SkyCab, SkyBridge, island geological wonders

days.title: Mangrove & Marine Expedition
days.description: Curated boat adventure exploring Langkawi's mangroves and pristine marine life — perfect for the whole family.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Guided mangrove and marine boat expedition

days.title: Departure
days.description: Last-minute shopping before flight home. Conclude your Malaysian adventure with unforgettable TRAGUIN memories.

inclusions.text: 05 Nights in handpicked premium family hotels across Kuala Lumpur and Langkawi
Private chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers throughout
Domestic flight coordination from Kuala Lumpur to Langkawi
Petronas Towers, Batu Caves, SkyBridge, and mangrove boat expedition
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International airfare and Malaysia entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
